# Find out who is engaging in   
quantum computing today.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/625830b5523011c240ee7fd8_customers-hero-illustration2.svg)

### JPMorgan Chase
###### Quantum Machine Learning in Finance
“As quantum computing continues to mature, JPMorgan Chase’s leading position will only be further solidified via future-ready algorithms that will produce continually improving results."
Marco Pistoia, Head of Global Technology Applied Research at JPMorgan Chase
###### How we helped
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/jpmc)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66cc56aa86163da36ec67b8d_towfiqu-barbhuiya-Q69veNk1iJQ-unsplash.jpg)
### Itaú Unibanco
###### Customer Retention
"We see in quantum computing the potential to greatly improve customer interactions and we have already benefited from QC Ware's insights with existing customer retention algorithms."
Moisés Nascimento, Chief Data Officer at Itaú Unibanco
###### How we helped
Customer Retention Modeling
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/itau)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66ebfe711e9c3cdd3beedca1_qc-ware.jpg)
### Covestro
###### Quantum Computing for Materials Design
“Our joint research with QC Ware over the next five years aims to develop new tools which our R&D team can use to develop new material classes and more efficient production processes that require less resources.”
Torsten Heinemann, Head of Group Innovation at Covestro
###### How we helped
Materials Discovery
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/covestro)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66be17839c0034b52af00e31_roche-image-small.jpg)
### Roche
###### Quantum Neural Networks
"Proud of the Roche pRED Quantum Computing Taskforce and QCWare releasing a paper on ArXiv, using #Quantumneuralnetworks for classifying biomedical images. The result of our joint exploration is to understand how quantum computing can support drug development."
Marielle van de Pol, Global Head Scientific Solution Engineering and Architecture
###### How we helped
Medical Image Recognition
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/roche)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66be16323e60e45dfe4cd8e2_goldman-sachs-image-small.jpg)
### Goldman Sachs
###### Quantum Speed-up of Monte Carlo Simulation
“With expertise in theory and simulation from QC Ware, we were able to better understand the constraints of the current technology of quantum computing for solving problems of business interest to us.” 
Paul Burchard, Managing Director
###### How we helped
Stochastic Processes & Derivative Pricing
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/goldman-sachs)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66be1448c11457c07f75a7b0_bmw-image-small.jpg)
### BMW
###### Quantum Computing in the Automotive Industry
"It’s like preparing for a 100m race with an undetermined start time; you need to be prepared to start any time or you will quickly be left behind."
Oliver Wick, BMW Group Research, New Technology, Innovation
###### How we helped
Quantum Machine Learning for Autonomous Vehicles
Quantum Optimization for Routing
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/bmw)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66d2bb92d3f358655e891a0a_asini-group-small.jpg)
### Aisin Group
###### Static Code Testing with Quantum Computing
“We are happy to work with QC Ware. Because our partnership with QC Ware has allowed AISIN Group to prepare for the emerging field of quantum computing”
Hiroshi Tsutsui, Senior Vice President, AW Technical Center U.S.A., Inc.
###### How we helped
Static code testing challenge
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/aisin-group)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba2335141fad0dbcd/66be13a32b32d73d191aee37_airbus-image-small.jpg)
### Airbus
###### Aerospace Optimization
“Airbus identified QC Ware as one of the key players in the field of quantum computing expertise. QC Ware has helped Airbus achieve a strong industrial position on quantum computing” 
Dr. Thierry Botter, Head of Airbus Blue Sky
###### How we helped
Design Verification Optimization Challenge
Flight Path Optimization
[Learn more ![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/623025ab510daaf32c21954e_arrow-right-black.svg)](https://www.qcware.com/customers/airbus)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/6075b7eba233511cc5d0dbc1/6075b7eba233516494d0dbee_qc-ware-logo-light-horizontal.avif)
